loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing total active power — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing V-THD, I-THD, and H5/H7 harmonic trends. Note: H5/H7 phase-specific columns (e.g., harmonic_5th_r_pct) are not present in the asset schema; the chart will display the aggregate harmonic_5th_pct and harmonic_7th_pct values for all phases.
